content.full_text:
February 25, 2004

Jennifer Singer, Senior Associate
VMA Communications, Inc.
141 Spring Street
Claremont, CA 91711

Re: Our File No. W-04-029

Dear Ms. Singer:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your February 6, 2004, request for written advice.

As you have elected to consult with legal counsel for your community college district, you no longer require assistance with the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Hyla P. Wagner
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

HPW:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
